systems.system_notes: Proximal humerus locking plate platform within the DePuy Synthes trauma plating portfolio, commonly referred to as PHILOS.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe dedicated PHILOS instrumentation and targeting devices within the trauma loan-set portfolio.

components.component_notes: Official J&J MedTech materials describe the locking proximal humerus plate family.
Official DePuy Synthes materials describe compatible locking screw fixation used with the PHILOS plate.
Official trauma loan-set materials explicitly reference dedicated targeting devices for PHILOS instrumentation.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current official sources identify the PHILOS implant family and tray instrumentation but do not expose a full product-code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, sterile implant listing, or ordering guide pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
